nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner

nodes.grounding_span: Definitely collaboration. In the realm of idea bouncing or research, I essentially interview AI

nodes.label: AI for text generation
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI to generate documents such as word documents to report and summarise data

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or inefficient for hands-on work
nodes.grounding_span: It is more of a time save than anything for me

nodes.label: Personal expression in emails and informal reports
nodes.grounding_span: Emails I see as a personal expression and dont think should be written by anyone (or anything!) other than myself

nodes.label: AI as file management and comparison tool
nodes.grounding_span: use AI to search through folders with hundreds of files to find what I am looking for quickly

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: save us all time if we can use it productively

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: When AI gives me a bunch of ideas I can take to the lab I find it satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: I got a bit frustrated today as the tool was helping with a prediction based calculation

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: I personally dont believe or worry about AI taking my job

nodes.label: Preference for personal control over email
